title: HyperFullbright+
description: HyperFullbright+ – Make mining effortless! Light up the dark and outline every ore so you can spot them from a distance.
body:
![HyperFullBright](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b9629156dc678100b84107f789b19dfff164511.png)

🌟 The Ultimate Fullbright Texture Pack
**No more dark caves or hidden ores!** HyperFullbright+ transforms your Minecraft world into a bright and clear environment. Whether you’re a seasoned miner or an adventurous explorer, spot every ore and enjoy perfect visibility everywhere.

---

## ✨ Why Choose HyperFullbright+?
*  **Easily spot ores** – every valuable block is outlined for maximum visibility.
*  **Daylight-like vision** – navigate caves and nighttime areas with total clarity.
*  **Readable interface and text** – menus and fonts stay perfectly clear.
*  **Up-to-date textures** – fully compatible with the latest Minecraft versions.
*  **Performance optimized** – works smoothly even with light mods and shaders.

---

## 📥 Installation
1. Download the `.zip` file from the official source.
2. Place it in your Minecraft resourcepacks folder:
   ```
   C:\Users\YourName\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks
   ```
3. Open Minecraft → **Options → Resource Packs**.
4. Activate **HyperFullbright+** and move it to the top of your list.
5. **Tip:** Disable any other packs or shaders that affect lighting for the best experience.
---
## 🔧 Compatibility

* ✅ Minecraft **1.21.2 and newer**
* ✅ Works in **Vanilla** (no mods required)
* ✅ Compatible with **OptiFine**, **Fabric**, **Iris**, **Sodium**, **Lunar**
---
## 🎮 Who Is HyperFullbright+ For?

* Miners who want to find every ore with ease
* Explorers venturing into deep caves or dark dungeons
* Players seeking a bright and clear Minecraft experience
* Streamers or content creators who want clean, readable visuals
---
💡 **Pro Tip:** Combine HyperFullbright+ with your favorite mods for an even more stunning Minecraft experience without sacrificing visibility or performance.
